# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: serviceaccount
  type: googleapis.com/ServiceAccount
  properties:
    accountId: myserviceaccount
    displayName: My Service Account

- name: keyfile
  type: gcpTypes/cloudresourcemanager/v1/KeyFile
  properties:
    name: projects/${selfLink}/serviceAccounts/myserviceaccount/secrets
    secretName: my-key
    format: JSON
    data: $(base64 $(gcloud iam service-account keys create --iam-account myserviceaccount@${projectId}.iam.gserviceaccount.com --json-keys -o json))

outputs:
  keyJson:
    value: $(base64 $(artifact 'keyfile'))
